en: A MASKIL OF DAVID, WHEN HE WAS IN THE CAVE. A PRAYER. With my voice I cry out to the LORD; with my voice I plead for mercy to the LORD.
zh: 我大聲向耶和華呼求， 高聲向耶和華懇求。

en: I pour out my complaint before him; I tell my trouble before him.
zh: 我在他面前傾吐我的苦情， 在他面前陳述我的患難。

en: When my spirit faints within me, you know my way! In the path where I walk they have hidden a trap for me.
zh: 我的靈在我裡面軟弱的時候， 你知道我的道路。 在我所行的路上， 敵人暗設網羅陷害我。

en: Look to the right and see: there is none who takes notice of me; no refuge remains to me; no one cares for my soul.
zh: 求你向我右邊觀看， 沒有人關心我； 我沒有逃難的地方， 也沒有人照顧我。

en: I cry to you, O LORD; I say, "You are my refuge, my portion in the land of the living."
zh: 耶和華啊！ 我向你呼求； 我說：“你是我的避難所， 是我在活人之地的業分。

en: Attend to my cry, for I am brought very low! Deliver me from my persecutors, for they are too strong for me!
zh: 求你留心聽我的呼求， 因為我落到極卑微的地步； 求你救我脫離逼迫我的人， 因為他們比我強大。

en: Bring me out of prison, that I may give thanks to your name! The righteous will surround me, for you will deal bountifully with me.
zh: 求你把我從牢獄中領出來， 好讓我稱讚你的名； 義人必環繞著我， 因為你以厚恩待我。”
